title: brachistus lasiophyllus
intro: Brachistus lasiophyllus, a flowering plant species in the family Orobanchaceae, is a type of broomrape that is native to Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Brachistus lasiophyllus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions or extracts, may be used to harness its medicinal properties.
